'''Grenadiers''' were members of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] who used [[Ion grenade/Legends|ion grenades]] as their primary weapon and wore [[Color/Legends|red]] uniforms similar to the [[Monarch of Naboo/Legends|Queen's]] [[Palace Guard]].<ref name="SW:OW" /> Other grenade troopers were the '''thermal detonator troopers''' who used [[Mortar/Legends|mortar]] to shoot [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]].<ref name="GB">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''</ref>

==History==
During the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], they saw action during the [[Capture of Theed/Legends|Fall of Theed]], fighting alongside [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] against the [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|Trade Federation Droid Army]]. One [[Unidentified grenadier|particular]] grenadier gave Kenobi several ion grenades to attack an [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tank]].<ref name="SW:OW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Grenadiers appear as generic allied computer-controlled characters during the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Obi-Wan (video game)|''Star Wars: Obi-Wan'']]. One has a speaking role and appears as part of a side-quest.<ref name="SW:OW" />
